standard_rows: All standard actions are complete, unclipped, and readable. Drag rows no longer end with a scale pop, and the jumping row preserves a fixed-size vertical arc rather than simulating height through scaling.
directions: The labeled 16-direction loop follows the intended axes and quadrants monotonically. All four cardinal hard gates pass blind review.
warnings: The user-approved network waving source is a 3D Nickelodeon render and therefore differs stylistically from the mostly 2D generated rows. Waiting, running, and review reuse one approved generated thinking-pose family in different frame orders because additional exact-character edits were repeatedly moderation-blocked. The 112.5 and 247.5 vertical components are subtle in isolated blind pairs.
repair: No blocking repair remains. Residual differences are documented in SOURCE.md and the row provenance files.

motionRepairs.jumping: fixed body scale with exact idle takeoff and landing frames
motionRepairs.runningLeft: exact horizontal mirrors of intact running-right frames
